name: Davos paragliding for two with an overnight stay in an igloo
description: Discover Davos paragliding for two with an overnight stay in an igloo in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Davos paragliding for two with an overnight stay in an igloo in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Paragliding
subcategory.description: Book your next paragliding trip in Switzerland here. During a tandem flight you can admire incredible landscapes from a bird's eye view. Hotspots for paragliding are Interlaken, Central Switzerland and the Engadine. But also in Valais there are some breathtaking launch sites. After a few quick steps you are in the air and can enjoy the surroundings while your tandem pilot ensures a safe flight.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Paragliding in the mountains with igloo in winter, enjoying snow, adventure, and nature.
Paragliding in the Alps with an igloo in the background and snow-covered mountains.
Paragliding over snow-covered Alps with an igloo in the background, ideal for adventure in nature.
Paragliding flights with an igloo in winter on snow-covered mountains with a dreamy view.
Paragliding in an igloo, winter experience with breathtaking views of the mountains.
